title: NBBL - Senior Associate / Lead - Product Development (BBPS)
description:
About the Company

NPCI Bharat BillPay Limited (NBBL) is a wholly owned subsidiary of the National Payments Corporation of India (NPCI), established to operate and manage the Bharat BillPay ecosystem. NBBL plays a pivotal role in India’s digital payments landscape by offering a unified, interoperable platform for bill payments across various categories such as electricity, water, gas, telecom, DTH, education, and more.




Incorporated under the regulatory framework of the Reserve Bank of India (RBI), NBBL is committed to building a secure, efficient, and inclusive bill payment infrastructure. It empowers consumers with convenient payment options and enables businesses with seamless collection mechanisms and real-time settlements.

To learn more about our company, please click on the link: About NBBL




About the Role

At NBBL we are looking for aspirants in Product development role who are passionate and energetic about building products which are innovative. As an ideal candidate, you will have a keen eye for gaps in consumer product offerings and the innovative mindset to fill them. You’re a highly skilled market analyst with a proven ability to strategize the full lifecycle of product production - from conception through release. At NBBL (Bharat Connect), you will be part of a dynamic and spirited team who are working with cross functional teams and external market players to design, build and rollout products that has impact across the nation.




Responsibilities

Gain a deep understanding of customer experience, identify and fill product gaps and generate new ideas that grow market share, improve customer experience and drive growth
Drive the product and business-planning process across cross-functional teams of the company
Drive the execution of all product lifecycle processes for products, including product ideation, product research, market research, competitive analysis, planning, positioning, roadmap development, requirements development, and product launch
Assess current competitor offerings, seeking opportunities for differentiation
Analyze data to get meaningful customer and business insights
Translate product strategy into detailed requirements and prototypes
Work closely with engineering teams to deliver with quick time-to-market and optimal resources

Qualifications

B.E/B.Tech with Professional degrees like MBA or equivalent




Required Skills

Ability to use AI capabilities and AI‑driven insights to inform product decisions, optimize development processes, and drive innovative solutions
Proven ability to develop product and marketing strategies and effectively communicate recommendations to executive management
Outstanding program management skills (communication, planning, execution); proven ability to identify opportunities and drive them through to completion
Drive execution of product roadmap, making smart trade-offs, coordinate dependencies, and maintain communication throughout the organization to guarantee smooth and efficient product delivery
Having knowledge and understanding of various technologies
Strong problem-solving skills and willingness to roll up one’s sleeves to get the job
Skilled at working effectively with cross functional teams in a matrix organization
Excellent written and verbal communication skills




Equal Opportunity Statement

As an Equal Opportunity Employer, NBBL fosters a workplace culture that values diversity and inclusion. It maintains zero tolerance for discrimination based on race, ethnicity, disability, gender identity, or sexual orientation, and actively supports the LGBTQ+ community.

Show more

title: Sales Associate
description:
Company Overview

Reliance Retail is India's largest and most profitable retailer, operating more than 15,000 stores across 7,000+ cities. Founded in 2006, the company is committed to revolutionizing retail in India, offering an unmatched shopping experience through a diversified omni-channel presence. With a strong brand portfolio, Reliance Retail serves over 193 million customers and employs more than 10,001 people, catering to various sectors such as Consumer Electronics, Fashion & Lifestyle, Grocery, and more. Headquartered in Mumbai, the company thrives on its advanced supply chain and technology infrastructure.

Job Overview

We are seeking a Sales Associate to join our dynamic team at Reliance My JIO Stores. This full-time position is open for freshers/experienced and is based in Mumbai, Navi Mumbai, Thane, and Kalamboli. As a Sales Associate, you will be responsible for supporting our sales operations and contributing to a superior shopping experience for our customers. The ideal candidate should have strong communication skills and a passion for customer service.

Qualifications And Skills

12th Pass Fresher/Graduate

Excellent customer service skills.

Strong communication and interpersonal abilities.

Ability to work flexible shifts, including evenings and weekends.

Well groomed.

Reliable & honest.

Multi-tasker.

Roles And Responsibilities

Manage daily store operations effectively.

Provide friendly and efficient customer service.

Accurately handle POS transactions and cash handling tasks.

Order and stock merchandise in alignment with store requirements.

Maintaining the guest area.

Comply with all company SOPs and policies to maintain standards.
Show more

title: Store Associate
description:
Company Overview

7-Eleven is a globally recognized brand that operates a chain of convenience stores. In India, 7-Eleven provides a unique shopping experience by offering a variety of everyday items and services, ensuring convenience and customer satisfaction. With a focus on local customer needs, 7-Eleven India aims to deliver a seamless shopping experience.

Job Overview

As a Store Associate at 7-Eleven India, you will play a vital role in the day-to-day operations of the store. Your contribution will ensure that all customers receive friendly and efficient service, contributing to the overall success and reputation of 7-Eleven in the marketplace.

Qualifications And Skills


12th Pass Fresher
Excellent customer service skills.
Strong communication and interpersonal abilities.
Ability to work flexible shifts, including evenings and weekends.
Well groomed.
Reliable & honest.
Multi-tasker.


Roles And Responsibilities


Manage daily store operations effectively.
Provide friendly and efficient customer service.
Accurately handle POS transactions and cash handling tasks.
Order and stock merchandise in alignment with store requirements.
Ensure the store is kept clean, performing tasks such as floor cleaning, deep cleaning, toilet cleaning, and maintaining the guest area.
Comply with all company SOPs and policies to maintain standards.
Show more

title: Associate Consultant - Capital Projects (MUM)
description:
Job Description

#KGS

As one of fastest growing practice in DAS, Infrastructure and Climate Advisory (ICA) team at KGS invites like-minded professionals to help us drive progress and change. At KGS ICA practice, you will work as part of a multidisciplinary team across a range of industries to assist public and private sector organizations involved in infrastructure to deliver desired outcomes, for society and businesses. We are the Centre of Excellence for KPMG’s Global practices, helping our clients to develop better understanding of the evolving policy and regulatory environment, business and commercial risks, as well as providing commercial and strategic advice on complex infrastructure and capital projects. You will work on a wide range of infrastructure sectors including transportation, digital and social infrastructure (education, healthcare), with diverse clientage a diverse range of clientele such as public sector entities, infrastructure owners, project developers, large corporates, contractors, equity investors, and financers.

The role will be based out of KPMG’s Mumbai office and liaise cross-functionally with leaders across the business to drive internal and external engagement.

Responsibilities


Ensure high-quality deliverables within set plans, budgets, and standards
Supporting client engagements with minimal supervision from senior team members, as necessary
Identification of client's potential challenges and issues in an engagement and proactively presenting initial solutions
Assist in developing thought leadership materials to enhance market intelligence and sector knowledge
Stay informed on industry trends, competitor moves, and product/service developments to maintain competitive edge
Independently engage with both domestic and global stakeholders, managing expectations and prioritizing work effectively
Demonstrate strong multi-tasking abilities, working efficiently with geographically dispersed teams in a fast-paced environment



Qualifications

Educational qualifications


MBA’s, Postgraduates and Engineers from a leading Indian/International educational institutions
Candidates holding certifications from renowned institutes including PMI or other professional certification relevant to the requirements are preferred, but not mandatory



Prior Experience


Relevant infrastructure sectors and/or experience of 1-3 years gained in global engineering and consulting firms



Mandatory Technical And Functional Skills


Strong understanding of the project management lifecycle, encompassing planning, budgeting, scheduling, risk, and stakeholder management
Experience in specific sectors of Infrastructure (Transport, Energy and Utilities, or Urban Infrastructure)
Understanding of concepts related to construction and project management
Familiarity with strategic planning, operational frameworks, leading processes, methodologies and technologies in the Construction industry
Strong analytical capabilities including but not limited to data analysis, risk assessments, project controls, business process re-engineering and providing recommendations for improvements
Ability to leverage AI-enabled tools in project management to enhance project delivery and assist in decision-making through faster insights, automation, and improved reporting
Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, PowerPoint, Word) and in making presentations for senior level stakeholders with effective story boarding skills
Knowledge of different software/applications including Power BI, Alteryx, Scheduling tools, BIM and Power Apps (preferred but not mandatory)



Show more

title: Sales
description:
Job Title: Customer Service Associate (CSA)

Department: Retail Operations

Reports To: Store Manager / Assistant Store Manager

Job Purpose

To deliver excellent customer service by assisting customers, driving sales through effective product recommendations, and ensuring smooth store operations.

Key Responsibilities


Greet customers warmly and understand their needs.
Provide accurate information about products, features, pricing, and promotions.
Drive sales through upselling and cross-selling.
Operate POS systems for billing, returns, and exchanges.
Ensure proper display of merchandise and maintain store cleanliness.
Handle customer queries and complaints professionally.
Follow company policies, SOPs, and safety guidelines.
Support inventory management and stock replenishment.


Key Skills & Competencies


Strong communication and interpersonal skills
Customer-focused attitude
Basic computer and POS knowledge
Sales orientation and negotiation skills
Problem-solving ability
Teamwork and adaptability


Qualifications & Experience


Minimum 10th / 12th pass (graduate preferred)
04 years of experience in retail or customer-facing roles


Performance Indicators (KPIs)


Customer satisfaction score
Sales conversion rate / Average Bill Value (ABV)
Billing accuracy
Attendance and punctuality

title: Customer Service Associate (CSA)
description:
Job Title: Customer Service Associate (CSA) Fashion Retail Store

Location: Mumbai & Navi Mumbai

Experience: 02 Years (Freshers can also apply)

Education: Minimum 12th Pass

Job Summary

We are looking for energetic and customer-focused individuals to join our fashion retail store as Customer Service Associates. The role involves assisting customers, maintaining store standards, and supporting daily store operations to deliver an excellent shopping experience.

Key Responsibilities


Greet and assist customers in a friendly and professional manner.
Help customers with product selection, sizing, and styling assistance.
Ensure merchandise is neatly displayed and shelves are well stocked.
Support billing and checkout processes when required.
Maintain cleanliness and overall store presentation.
Handle customer queries and provide prompt solutions.
Support inventory management and stock replenishment.
Work collaboratively with team members to achieve store sales targets.


Skills Required


Good communication and interpersonal skills.
Customer service orientation.
Basic understanding of retail store operations.
Positive attitude and willingness to learn.
Ability to work in shifts, weekends, and holidays.


Eligibility


Minimum qualification: 12th Pass.
Experience in retail/customer service preferred but not mandatory.
Freshers with good communication skills are welcome.


What We Offer


Opportunity to build a career in fashion retail.
On-the-job training and growth opportunities.
Competitive salary and performance incentives.

title: Associate Consultant HR M&A
description:
Job Description

#KGS

KPMG Global Services (KGS) was set up in India in 2008. It is a strategic global delivery organization, which works with more than 50 KPMG member firms to provide a progressive, scalable and customized approach to business requirements

The KGS journey has been one of consistent growth, with a current employee count of nearly 10,000 operating from four locations in India — Bengaluru, Gurugram, Kochi, Pune and Mumbai providing a range of Advisory and Tax-related services to member firms within the KPMG network.

As part of KPMG in India, we were ranked among the top companies to work for in the country for four years in a row by LinkedIn, and recognized as one of the top three employers in the region for women, as well as for policies on Inclusion & Diversity by ASSOCHAM (The Associated Chambers of Commerce & Industry of India).

Team Overview

The position in discussion is with Integration & Separation (I&S), Technology in M&A within the Deal Advisory group at KPMG Global Services (KGS), which is KPMG’s global delivery center and an integral part of the firm’s strategy to enhance innovation, build scalability, and improve profitability globally.


KGS DA&S has been providing solutions to KPMG member firms globally. By leveraging insights and applying best practices, the team helps create customized approaches to M&A transactions. The team’s capabilities include Corporate Finance, Transaction Services, Strategy, Business Modelling, Accounting Advisory Services, Deal Advisory Research and Benchmarking.



Responsibilities

We are recruiting for Associate Consultant in the HR M&A team.

Roles & responsibilities


Working with onshore colleagues to lead and provide support on a wide variety of M&A projects including global programs from a people, workforce analytics and organization effectiveness perspective
Support and sometimes lead work streams on HR I&S projects, supporting client work stream leads to fulfil their work stream objectives
Work with project teams to analyze workforce data by applying key analytical tools to provide key insights and suggest solutions to solve complex client challenges
Demonstrate technical and analytical competence in a deal context for key HR aspects: HR Operations, Labor Relations & Compliance, Organization & Talent Management and Employee Experience and Day 1 comms
Proactively co-ordinate with onshore engagement teams to procure new engagements / engagement work, obtain clarifications, communicate progress and post-delivery de-brief and feedback
Seek ownership for independent engagement and tasks and on larger engagements oversee the work of more junior team members
Assist in the development and presentation of final project deliverables
Provide coaching and development opportunities for junior team members, and act as a mentor to colleagues within the team
Work with cross-functional teams in implementing services, lead team interviews and hold workshops as necessary
When you are not working on a project, you will provide support to senior colleagues in preparation of proposal materials



Qualifications

This role is for you if you have the below

Educational Qualifications


MBA / Bachelor’s degree in a related field from an accredited college/university preferably with major in Human resources



Work Experience


1-3 years of total work experience



Mandatory Technical & Functional Skills


Experience of working on M&A projects including an understanding of HR’s involvement in the deal process is desirable
Experience of working with Powered BI, Alteryx, Tableau
Relevant professional experience, including previous work with a Big 4, global management consultancy firm, or performed an in-house role in which you gained exposure to a large-scale project(s)
Experience working within an HR function including workforce analytics, organization effectiveness, people strategy, organizational design, HR operating model, HR Process efficiency & policy, change management, employee engagement, talent management (Not all specialisms are required and a deep understanding in one area may be sufficient)
Experience of handling multiple stakeholders including ownership of deliverables and good commercial acumen
High quality outputs on Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint. Knowledge or experience on Visio, OrgVue would also be beneficial



Preferred Technical & Functional Skills


Analysis, problem solving and Report writing
A basic understanding of project management methodologies and outputs
Good client relationship skills
Show more

title: Associate Center Manager
description:
In this role, you’ll be driving membership sales and managing day-to-day center operations. You’ll interact with potential clients and existing members, ensuring a seamless experience while overseeing inventory, scheduling, and class management. Your passion for fitness and attention to detail will be key in creating a welcoming atmosphere and achieving your sales targets.


Sales:
Responsible for promoting and selling memberships to potential new clients
Walk-ins/Trials Responsible for achieving target by driving conversion - Responsible for Up-selling
Should maintain record of every interaction with new user
Should enter all details of customers, walk- ins on internal tools.
Operations:
Managing center experience and incremental enhancements
Timely Opening and Closing of the center -Inventory management: Ensure inventory of essentials, supplies and equipment, responsible for both stocking and re-ordering (first-aid,stationary, water, towels etc.)
Managing classes and workout
Ensuring punctuality of trainers and classes
Handle issues with respect to attendance, equipment and space availability
Customer interactions and troubleshooting
Interact with walk-ins and prospective clients
Improving member attendance through meet and greet, familiarity building and creating a welcoming atmosphere.
Take feedback from members and partners about classes and document the same - handle issues that may lead to consumer experience during or pre/post class


Requirements


A Bachelor’s degree
0-4 years of work experience
Passion for fitness and healthy living
People management skills
Good Communication skills(Proficiency in English)


Sales, Operations, Customer Experience

title: Associate - Operations - Operations - CBS - RM - PROJ & OPERATIONS - Mumbai
description:
Requisition Id: 1695427

As a global leader in assurance, tax, transaction and advisory services, we hire and develop the most passionate people in their field to help build a better working world. This starts with a culture that believes in giving you the training, opportunities and creative freedom. At EY, we don't just focus on who you are now, but who you can become. We believe that it’s your career and ‘It’s yours to build’ which means potential here is limitless and we'll provide you with motivating and fulfilling experiences throughout your career to help you on the path to becoming your best professional self.

The opportunity : Associate-Operations-Operations-CBS - RM - PROJ & OPERATIONS - Mumbai

Operations :

No Data Available

CBS - RM - PROJ & OPERATIONS :

Our enablement functions help everyone at EY operate more efficiently. As a CBS professional, you will work across teams to provide the knowledge, resources and tools that help EY deliver exceptional quality service to our clients, win in the marketplace and support EY’s growth and profitability. Major teams within CBS include Finance, Information Technology, Human Resources, Enterprise Support Services, Admin, Brand, Marketing and Communications, Quality and Risk Management.

With so many offerings, you have the opportunity to develop your career through a broad scope of engagements, mentoring and formal learning. We aim to develop outstanding leaders who team to deliver on our promises to all of our stakeholders, besides playing a critical role in building a better working world for our people, clients and communities.

Your Key Responsibilities

Technical Excellence


To work in Risk Management COE team and assist in vendor onboarding requests for various service lines along with few other risk management activities


Skills And Attributes

To qualify for the role you must have

Qualification


Bachelor of Commerce
Bachelor of Business Administration


Experience


Fresher (0-2 years experience)


What We Look For

People with the ability to work in a collaborative manner to provide services across multiple client departments while following the commercial and legal requirements. You will need a practical approach to solving issues and complex problems with the ability to deliver insightful and practical solutions. We look for people who are agile, curious, mindful, and able to sustain positive energy, while being adaptable and creative in their approach.

What We Offer

Fuelled by the brilliance of our people, EY has emerged as the strongest brand and the most attractive employer in our field, with market-leading growth over competitors. Our people work side-by-side with market-leading entrepreneurs, game-changers, disruptors, and visionaries. As an organization, we are investing more time, technology, and money than ever before in skills and learning for our people. At EY, you will have a personalized Career Journey and also the chance to tap into the resources of our career frameworks to better know about your roles, skills, and opportunities.

EY is equally committed to being an inclusive employer, and we strive to achieve the right balance for our people—enabling us to deliver excellent client service while allowing our people to build their careers as well as focus on their wellbeing.

If you can confidently demonstrate that you meet the criteria above, please contact us as soon as possible.

Join us in shaping the future with confidence. Apply Now

title: Associate Relationship Manager - Commercial Banking
description:
Job Requirements

Role/ Job Title: Associate Relationship Manager – Commercial Banking

Function/ Department: Commercial Banking

Job Purpose

Support the Relationship Manager in acquiring and activating clients, driving book growth and fee income, and cross‑selling transaction banking products (CMS, Trade Services) and treasury/FX solutions, while ensuring flawless execution, documentation, and risk/compliance hygiene across the portfolio. Coordinate with product, credit, legal, and operations teams to deliver timely solutions, superior client service, and robust MIS/reporting.

Roles & Responsibilities


Assist in preparing client proposals, credit appraisals, and documentation.
Act as a secondary point of contact for clients, ensuring timely responses to queries.
Support RMs in meeting balance sheet and income targets from interest and fee-based products.
Track opportunity pipelines and account activation (utilization, first drawdown, wallet ramp-up).
Ensure smooth execution of transactions, including disbursements and amendments.
Coordinate with internal teams to resolve operational bottlenecks.
Prepare CAM for NTB and ETB renewals; monitor covenants for existing contracts.
Maintain accurate client records, including financial statements and transaction history.
Generate reports for RM and management review.
Identify opportunities for cross-selling products like treasury services, CMS, and forex.
Support RM in achieving cross-sell targets.
Maintain CRM hygiene by logging interactions, updating opportunities, and ensuring periodic reviews.
Prepare meeting notes and action trackers; follow through to closure.
Support audits and compliance reviews; close observations within timelines.
Curate sector and competitor intelligence; contribute to campaigns and AOP inputs.
Provide back-up coverage for RM during leave/travel to ensure service continuity.


Education Qualification

Graduation: Any graduate

Post-graduation: Any post- graduate

Experience: 0 to 4 years of relevant experience
Show more

title: Associate - Category Management (International Business)
description:
About The Company

Who are we?

Myntra is India’s leading fashion and lifestyle platform, where technology meets creativity. As pioneers in fashion e-commerce, we’ve always believed in disrupting the ordinary.

We thrive on a shared passion for fashion, a drive to innovate to lead, and an environment that empowers each one of us to pave our own way. We’re bold in our thinking, agile in our execution, and collaborative in spirit.

Here, we create MAGIC by inspiring vibrant and joyous self-expression and expanding fashion possibilities for India, while staying true to what we believe in.

We believe in taking bold bets and changing the fashion landscape of India. We are a company that is constantly evolving into newer and better forms and we look for people who are ready to evolve with us.

From our humble beginnings as a customization company in 2007 to being technology and fashion pioneers today, Myntra is going places and we want you to take part in this journey with us.

Working at Myntra is challenging but fun - we are a young and dynamic team, firm believers in meritocracy, believe in equal opportunity, encourage intellectual curiosity and empower our teams with the right tools, space, and opportunities.


MIS, Data Analytics & Trade Reporting


Daily,Weekly,Monthly,seasonal Trade Analysis: Produce the "Monday Trade Pack," analyzing performance across all channels. You will identify "Top 10" and "Bottom 10" performers and provide the "Why" behind the numbers.

Develop and maintain masters : Make and update various masters - product and store

KPI Tracking: Discount, sell thru, DRR, PvA, etc

Ad-hoc Deep Dives: Conduct specific category analysisto support the Senior Merchandiser’s strategy.Develop and maintain trackers for lead merchandiser


Inventory Allocation & Stock ManagementInitial


Allocation: Ensure execution of the distribution of new seasonal drops across the store network based on historical cluster performance and current trend forecasts.

Replenishment: Ensuring Management of replenishment in store

Consolidation: Identify "broken" size sets in low-performing stores and recommend stock transfers to high-performing "power" stores to maximize full-price sales and suggest the same to merchandiser


Digital & E-commerce Merchandising


Product Lifecycle Management: Manage the "Go-Live" process. This includes verifying product descriptions, ensuring correct tax/currency attributes, and checking that image alt-text is SEO-compliant.

Site Health Checks: Conduct daily audits of the "New Arrivals" and "Sale" categories.

Ensure that products with no stock are automatically hidden to prevent "No stock" for customer frustrations.

Promotional Execution: Ensuring the digital price matches the physical store ticket ; Ensuring discount guardrails are being followed (daily/weekly cadence)


Self development & training - Ensure training and self development to remain up to date


Required Skills

category management, ecommerce merchandising, data reporting, p&l management, assortment planning

Required Education

UG
Show more

title: Associate Business Development
description:
About The Company

Who are we?

Myntra is India’s leading fashion and lifestyle platform, where technology meets creativity. As pioneers in fashion e-commerce, we’ve always believed in disrupting the ordinary.

We thrive on a shared passion for fashion, a drive to innovate to lead, and an environment that empowers each one of us to pave our own way. We’re bold in our thinking, agile in our execution, and collaborative in spirit.

Associate Business Development: Proven track record (3+ years) within the beauty industry, specifically ine-commerce and business development. Extensive experience and success in working for International Beauty Brands or as partners to the Brands. Strong analytical skills with proficiency in data-driven decision-making and performance optimization. Excellent communication and negotiation skills with the ability to build and maintain strategic partnerships. Self-directed focus and ability to prioritize within an ambiguous environment Ability to execute and follow through on high-quality output, with limited oversight. Ability to work with cross-functional teams and influence/rally/align them towards a common goal. Ability to work with Internal and external stakeholders. To follow up on leads consistently and status updates on ongoing and new BD opportunities to align with BU goals Strong verbal & written communication skills Ability to liaise with people Category interest is a must. The ideal candidate will possess a strong track record of brand sourcing, commercial acumen, and supporting end-to-end onboarding of global labels, with a deep understanding of consumer trends and operational requirements in the Beauty and personal care sector. Identify and evaluate international fashion and lifestyle brands that align with the company's growth strategy and market positioning. Proactively build and maintain relationships with global brand owners, principals, and agencies. Open to travel to meet business requirements.

Required Skills

Business Development

title: NBBL - Senior Associate / Lead - Product Development (BBPS)
description:
About the Company

NPCI Bharat BillPay Limited (NBBL) is a wholly owned subsidiary of the National Payments Corporation of India (NPCI), established to operate and manage the Bharat BillPay ecosystem. NBBL plays a pivotal role in India’s digital payments landscape by offering a unified, interoperable platform for bill payments across various categories such as electricity, water, gas, telecom, DTH, education, and more.




Incorporated under the regulatory framework of the Reserve Bank of India (RBI), NBBL is committed to building a secure, efficient, and inclusive bill payment infrastructure. It empowers consumers with convenient payment options and enables businesses with seamless collection mechanisms and real-time settlements.

To learn more about our company, please click on the link: About NBBL




About the Role

At NBBL we are looking for aspirants in Product development role who are passionate and energetic about building products which are innovative. As an ideal candidate, you will have a keen eye for gaps in consumer product offerings and the innovative mindset to fill them. You’re a highly skilled market analyst with a proven ability to strategize the full lifecycle of product production - from conception through release. At NBBL (Bharat Connect), you will be part of a dynamic and spirited team who are working with cross functional teams and external market players to design, build and rollout products that has impact across the nation.




Responsibilities

Gain a deep understanding of customer experience, identify and fill product gaps and generate new ideas that grow market share, improve customer experience and drive growth
Drive the product and business-planning process across cross-functional teams of the company
Drive the execution of all product lifecycle processes for products, including product ideation, product research, market research, competitive analysis, planning, positioning, roadmap development, requirements development, and product launch
Assess current competitor offerings, seeking opportunities for differentiation
Analyze data to get meaningful customer and business insights
Translate product strategy into detailed requirements and prototypes
Work closely with engineering teams to deliver with quick time-to-market and optimal resources

Qualifications

B.E/B.Tech with Professional degrees like MBA or equivalent




Required Skills

Ability to use AI capabilities and AI‑driven insights to inform product decisions, optimize development processes, and drive innovative solutions
Proven ability to develop product and marketing strategies and effectively communicate recommendations to executive management
Outstanding program management skills (communication, planning, execution); proven ability to identify opportunities and drive them through to completion
Drive execution of product roadmap, making smart trade-offs, coordinate dependencies, and maintain communication throughout the organization to guarantee smooth and efficient product delivery
Having knowledge and understanding of various technologies
Strong problem-solving skills and willingness to roll up one’s sleeves to get the job
Skilled at working effectively with cross functional teams in a matrix organization
Excellent written and verbal communication skills




Equal Opportunity Statement

As an Equal Opportunity Employer, NBBL fosters a workplace culture that values diversity and inclusion. It maintains zero tolerance for discrimination based on race, ethnicity, disability, gender identity, or sexual orientation, and actively supports the LGBTQ+ community.

title: Customer Support Associate- Fresher
description:
Job Description

Yousta- Reliance Retail

Retail Associate Fresher (12th Pass)

Job Title: Retail Sales Associate (Fresher)

Department: Retail / Store Operations

Location: [Store Location]

Employment Type: Full-time / Part-time

Job Summary

We are looking for enthusiastic and customer-focused freshers to join our retail team. As a Retail Sales Associate, you will be responsible for assisting customers, managing store operations, and ensuring a smooth shopping experience. Training will be provided, making this an excellent opportunity for candidates looking to start their career in retail.

Key Responsibilities


Greet customers and provide excellent customer service
Understand customer needs and recommend suitable products
Assist in maintaining product displays, shelves, and store cleanliness
Process billing, handle cash/UPI transactions, and manage POS systems
Replenish stock and ensure correct product tagging
Support store promotional activities and sales campaigns
Handle customer queries and resolve basic issues
Follow company policies, procedures, and safety guidelines


Required Skills & Qualities


Good communication and interpersonal skills
Positive attitude and willingness to learn
Basic understanding of retail or customer service (training provided)
Ability to work in a fast-paced environment
Team player with good problem-solving skills
Flexibility to work shifts, weekends, or holidays


Eligibility & Education


Qualification: 10th / 12th / Diploma / Graduate
Experience: No prior experience required (freshers welcome)

title: Sales Associate
description:
Company Overview

Reliance Retail is India's largest and most profitable retailer, operating more than 15,000 stores across 7,000+ cities. Founded in 2006, the company is committed to revolutionizing retail in India, offering an unmatched shopping experience through a diversified omni-channel presence. With a strong brand portfolio, Reliance Retail serves over 193 million customers and employs more than 10,001 people, catering to various sectors such as Consumer Electronics, Fashion & Lifestyle, Grocery, and more. Headquartered in Mumbai, the company thrives on its advanced supply chain and technology infrastructure.

Job Overview

We are seeking a Sales Associate to join our dynamic team at Reliance My JIO Stores. This full-time position is open for freshers/experienced and is based in Mumbai, Navi Mumbai, Thane, and Kalamboli. As a Sales Associate, you will be responsible for supporting our sales operations and contributing to a superior shopping experience for our customers. The ideal candidate should have strong communication skills and a passion for customer service.

Qualifications And Skills

12th Pass Fresher/Graduate

Excellent customer service skills.

Strong communication and interpersonal abilities.

Ability to work flexible shifts, including evenings and weekends.

Well groomed.

Reliable & honest.

Multi-tasker.

Roles And Responsibilities

Manage daily store operations effectively.

Provide friendly and efficient customer service.

Accurately handle POS transactions and cash handling tasks.

Order and stock merchandise in alignment with store requirements.

Maintaining the guest area.

Comply with all company SOPs and policies to maintain standards.
Show more

In India, 7-Eleven provides a unique shopping experience by offering a variety of everyday items and services, ensuring convenience and customer satisfaction. With a focus on local customer needs, 7-Eleven India aims to deliver a seamless shopping experience.

As a Store Associate at 7-Eleven India, you will play a vital role in the day-to-day operations of the store. Your contribution will ensure that all customers receive friendly and efficient service, contributing to the overall success and reputation of 7-Eleven in the marketplace.

title: Customer Service Associates
description:
Job Title: Customer Service Associate (CSA)

Department: Retail Operations

Reports To: Store Manager / Assistant Store Manager

Job Purpose

To deliver excellent customer service by assisting customers, driving sales through effective product recommendations, and ensuring smooth store operations.

Key Responsibilities


Greet customers warmly and understand their needs.
Provide accurate information about products, features, pricing, and promotions.
Drive sales through upselling and cross-selling.
Operate POS systems for billing, returns, and exchanges.
Ensure proper display of merchandise and maintain store cleanliness.
Handle customer queries and complaints professionally.
Follow company policies, SOPs, and safety guidelines.
Support inventory management and stock replenishment.


Key Skills & Competencies


Strong communication and interpersonal skills
Customer-focused attitude
Basic computer and POS knowledge
Sales orientation and negotiation skills
Problem-solving ability
Teamwork and adaptability


Qualifications & Experience


Minimum 10th / 12th pass (graduate preferred)
04 years of experience in retail or customer-facing roles


Performance Indicators (KPIs)


Customer satisfaction score
Sales conversion rate / Average Bill Value (ABV)
Billing accuracy
Attendance and punctuality

title: Customer Support Associate
description:
Company Overview

Reliance Retail, founded in 2006, is Indias largest and most profitable retailer with a vast omni-channel presence. The company operates over 15,000 stores in more than 7,000 cities, providing superior quality products across Consumer Electronics, Fashion, Grocery, Pharma, and Connectivity. With an extensive digital commerce platform and a strong supply chain, Reliance Retail prioritizes an unmatched shopping experience and customer service. Headquartered in Mumbai, it employs over 10,000 people and remains a key player in the retail industry.

Job Overview

We are seeking a Junior Customer Support Associate to join our team in Ludhiana. The ideal candidate will have 1 to 3 years of experience in a customer-facing role, ensuring a superior consumer experience. This full-time position requires an individual adept in handling customer queries and enhancing satisfaction across various channels as we continue to expand our retail presence and service excellence.

Qualifications And Skills


Proven customer service experience with a minimum of one year in a customer-facing role to handle inquiries efficiently.
Exceptional communication skills to interact clearly and concisely with customers and stakeholders at all levels.
Strong problem-solving abilities with a proactive approach to spotting potential issues and developing swift solutions.
Proficiency in cash handling operations to ensure accurate transactions and maintain financial records.
Knowledge and experience in backend operations for effective coordination of internal processes and order management.
Customer Experience (Mandatory skill) is essential to actively enhance consumer interactions through feedback loops.
Customer Support (Mandatory skill) demonstrating expertise in providing timely resolutions and seamless service delivery.
BOH (Mandatory skill), or back of house skills, required for efficient operation and support staff coordination.


Roles And Responsibilities


Provide excellent customer service by understanding customer requirements and offering appropriate solutions promptly.
Engage with customers across channels to ensure a consistent and positive experience throughout their service journey.
Assist in handling customer complaints and inquiries, ensuring all issues are resolved satisfactorily within company guidelines.
Coordinate effectively with the back-end operations team to streamline processes and enhance customer satisfaction.
Maintain accurate customer records using digital tools for efficient data management and future reference.
Support the sales team by cross-checking product information and assisting during high demand periods as required.
Perform cash handling tasks responsibly, safeguarding financial integrity and following company policies.
Contribute to company growth by identifying potential service improvements and providing valuable customer insights.
Show more

title: MIS Finance Analyst
description:
Finance Analyst Category

Financial Management & Reporting


Assist in preparing monthly, quarterly, and annual financial reports for the category.
Support budget planning and forecasting activities.
Track category-specific expenses and revenues.
Reconcile financial discrepancies and ensure data accuracy.


Data Analysis & Insights


Analyze category performance metrics and provide insights to support business decisions.
Monitor KPIs and identify trends or variances.
Prepare Value Chain and compare with Standard VC and identify the root cause of variances.
Liaise with internal teams (e.g., procurement, sales, Supply Chain) for category-related financial matters.


Looking for Qualified CMA OR CA from FMCG industry Only

Location - Yelahanka, Bangalore
